parameters.query:
SELECT 
  c.access_token, 
  a.custom_attributes->'config'->'prompts' as prompts,
  a.custom_attributes->'config'->'chatGPTEnabled' as bot_enabled,
  a.custom_attributes->'config'->'response_delay' as delay,
  a.custom_attributes->'config'->'shipping_instructions' as shipping_instructions,
  a.custom_attributes->'config'->'post_sale' as post_sale,
  a.id as chatwoot_account_id,
  -- Buscamos el ID del inbox por nombre
  (SELECT id FROM inboxes 
   WHERE account_id = a.id 
   AND name ILIKE '%Pre-venta (MercadoLibre)%' 
   LIMIT 1) as meli_inbox_id,
  -- Buscamos el ID del equipo por nombre
  (SELECT id FROM teams 
   WHERE account_id = a.id 
   AND name ILIKE '%Pre-venta%' 
   LIMIT 1) as meli_team_id,
  -- Saludos por tienda oficial
  (SELECT jsonb_object_agg(meli_store_id, custom_greeting)
   FROM meli_official_stores
   WHERE account_id = a.id
   AND custom_greeting IS NOT NULL AND custom_greeting <> ''
  ) as store_greetings
FROM meli_credentials c
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = c.account_id
WHERE c.ml_user_id = '{{ $('meli_notifications').item.json.body.user_id }}';

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO meli_questions (question_id, account_id, status)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.body.resource.split("/").pop() }}',
    (SELECT account_id FROM meli_credentials WHERE ml_user_id = '{{ $json.body.user_id.toString() }}'),
    'processing'
  )
  ON CONFLICT (question_id) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING question_id
)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.body.resource.split("/").pop() }}' AS question_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ins) AS is_new;
